title: Day 1: The SMM Landscape
content: Theory: Roles of an SMM (Growth vs. Support).
exercise: Exercise: List 3 wins and 3 misses for a brand of your choice.

title: Day 2: Digital Audits
exercise: Exercise: Perform a "Bio & Link" audit on a local business profile.

title: Day 3: Target Audience
exercise: Exercise: Create a 1-page persona for a brand selling high-end tech.

title: Day 4: Competitor Research
exercise: Exercise: Find 5 competitors; note their most commented-on post this month.

title: Day 5: SMART Goal Setting
exercise: Exercise: Write 3 SMART goals for a startup launch in 90 days.

title: Day 6: LinkedIn Authority
exercise: Exercise: Draft a 3-paragraph "Lesson Learned" post for LinkedIn.

title: Day 7: Platform Nuance
content: Theory: The Hook-Value-CTA loop for Reels.
exercise: Exercise: Script a 30-second video with 3 visual hooks.

title: Day 8: Content Pillars
exercise: Exercise: Define 4 pillars for a personal brand (e.g., BTS, News, Tips, Story).

title: Day 9: Content Calendar
content: Theory: Monthly planning vs. daily stress.
exercise: Exercise: Map out a 7-day calendar without repeating pillars back-to-back.

title: Day 10: Hook Writing
exercise: Exercise: Take one topic and write 10 different hooks for it.

title: Day 11: Caption Architecture
exercise: Exercise: Write an Instagram caption that uses a "Cliffhanger" to drive people to the comments.

title: Day 12: Visual Sourcing
exercise: Exercise: Find 5 free high-quality stock clips that fit a "Luxury" brand aesthetic.

title: Day 13: Repurposing Flow
content: Theory: Turning 1 long video into 10 posts.
exercise: Exercise: Take a blog post; turn it into 3 LinkedIn posts and 1 Reel script.

title: Day 14: AI for SMM
exercise: Exercise: Prompt an AI to generate a "Content Matrix" for a tech company.

title: Day 15: The $1.80 Strategy
exercise: Exercise: Leave meaningful, 2-sentence comments on 10 niche posts.

title: Day 16: Community Mgmt
exercise: Exercise: Create a "Standard Response" document for 5 common FAQs.

title: Day 17: Viral Mechanics
exercise: Exercise: Analyze a viral video; identify the core "Share-trigger" it used.

title: Day 18: Social SEO
exercise: Exercise: Research 15 keywords for a specific brand on Instagram.

title: Day 19: Influencer Pitching
exercise: Exercise: Draft a 3-sentence DM pitch to a potential brand partner.

title: Day 20: Meta Ads Basics
exercise: Exercise: Navigate the Meta Ads Manager and find the "Audience Targeting" tab.

title: Day 21: LinkedIn Ads
exercise: Exercise: Draft a "Lead Magnet" ad copy for a consulting business.

title: Day 22: Analytics Deep Dive
exercise: Exercise:Calculate the ER of your last 3 social posts.

title: Day 23: Data-Driven Pivoting
content: Theory: What to do when strategy fails.
exercise: Exercise: Analyze a low-performing post; list 3 things you would fix in a "Remake."

title: Day 24: Client Reporting
exercise: Exercise: Create a 1-page report template that highlights growth and top posts.

title: Day 25: Crisis Management
content: Theory: Dealing with trolls and PR.
exercise: Exercise: Write a response to a fake 1-star review that is professional and helpful.

title: Day 26: Onboarding Systems
exercise: Exercise: Create a 10-question "Brand Discovery" form.

title: Day 27: Pricing Packages
exercise: Exercise: Create 3 SMM packages (Basic, Growth, Pro) with pricing.

title: Day 28: Automation Stack
exercise: Exercise: Schedule 3 posts to go live at "Peak Times" using a free trial tool.

title: Day 29: Case Study Design
content: Theory: Proving your value to clients.
exercise: Exercise: Write a "Before and After" story for a fictional social project.

title: Day 30: Portfolio Launch
exercise: Exercise: Create a "Social Media Portfolio" link on Canva or Behance.
